items.title: Transactions by Payment Cards to Top 1.1 Trillion Annually by 2029
items.author: Globe Newswire
items.description: The Nilson Report projects that credit, debit, and prepaid card transactions on global brand card networks will reach 1.109 trillion worldwide in 2029, a 43% increase from 2024. Asia-Pacific is expected to be the top region, led by UnionPay, followed by Europe and the United States.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article projects strong growth in global card transactions, which is positive for Visa as a leading global payment network.
The article projects strong growth in global card transactions, which is positive for Mastercard as a leading global payment network.
The article includes American Express as one of the major global payment networks, which is expected to benefit from the projected growth in card transactions.
The article includes Discover as one of the global payment networks, but does not provide any specific details about its performance or outlook.
